---
name: Project Phase
about: Create a project phase issue for development tracking
title: '[PHASE-X] '
labels: project-phase
assignees: ''
---

## Phase Information
- **Phase Number**: [e.g., Phase 1, Phase 2, etc.]
- **Phase Name**: [e.g., Branding & Constants]
- **Estimated Duration**: [e.g., 1-2 weeks]
- **Priority**: [High/Medium/Low]

## Phase Description
<!-- Brief description of what this phase accomplishes -->

## Deliverables
<!-- List the specific deliverables for this phase -->
- [ ] Deliverable 1
- [ ] Deliverable 2
- [ ] Deliverable 3

## Tasks
<!-- Detailed tasks within this phase -->
- [ ] Task 1: [Description]
- [ ] Task 2: [Description]
- [ ] Task 3: [Description]

## Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Define what "done" looks like for this phase -->
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Dependencies
<!-- List any dependencies or prerequisites -->
- Depends on: #issue_number
- Blocks: #issue_number

## Technical Requirements
<!-- Any technical requirements or constraints -->
- Requirement 1
- Requirement 2

## Testing Requirements
<!-- What testing is needed for this phase -->
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Performance testing

## Documentation Requirements
<!-- What documentation needs to be updated -->
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] User documentation
- [ ] Developer documentation
- [ ] README updates

## Risk Assessment
<!-- Identify potential risks and mitigation strategies -->
- **Risk 1**: [Description] - Mitigation: [Strategy]
- **Risk 2**: [Description] - Mitigation: [Strategy]

## Success Metrics
<!-- How will we measure success for this phase -->
- Metric 1: [Description]
- Metric 2: [Description]

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about this phase -->

## Definition of Done
<!-- What needs to be completed for this phase to be considered done -->
- [ ] All deliverables completed
- [ ] All tests passing
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] Phase review completed
